role: Configuration directory for GitHub project management, automated workflows, and contribution templates.
responsibility: Ensures consistent issue reporting, automated dependency updates, standardized pull request submissions, and CI/CD pipelines for testing, documentation deployment, releases, and architecture compliance.

children.role: Issue template definitions for the ArchSpine project.
Automated dependency configuration for repository maintenance
Guides contributors through the structure and requirements for submitting a pull request in the ArchSpine project.
Contains CI/CD workflow definitions for automated testing, documentation deployment, release management, and architecture compliance checks.
